steps.t: The cave of Lhingroth can be found in the hills to the east of Sardol. Amathon has asked you to brave the depths of Lhingroth in hopes of finding what…
The chill seems to be emanating from the path to the right in Lhingroth. You feel a peculiar chill inside Lhingroth and should investigate further.
A suspiciously preserved skeleton can be found in the depths of Lhingroth. You have found a strange altar, and what appear to be preserved bones. You …
Amathon can be found in Sardol, to the west of Lhingroth. You have been confronted by an oath-breaker of the Ruthless Dead who warned of their intent …
